{{Infobox technique
| name = Reaper’s Sword
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] unleashed the [[Reaper’s Sword]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] performs a slash known as the [[Reaper’s Sword]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Every [[Reaper’s Sword]] technique reduces the lifespan of the weapon.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] took the stance for the [[Reaper’s Sword]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
